channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Top layer of tarmac gone, 24th March
item.description:
Just to the right as you leave bournside drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken drain cover in the road, 24th March
item.description:
The drain is just down the road as you turn left out of polefield road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole around drain, 24th March
item.description:
On the outside of the road near the polefield gardens road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x400x40mm approx 3 way lights X 2 NSD Not marked or measured (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unfinished road, 24th March
item.description:
This road has not been finished by the developer long after their planning permission said it would be and it’s not been connected to frog Furlong Lane again outside of the planning consent. The impact is that the exposed iron works create excessive road noise that wake us up at all hours of the day and when Hugo’s vehicles hit it shakes the entire house Due to The failing to connect to the road network on frog floor lane more than double the amount of traffic is transiting this road as it was originally designed for
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Matilda Street, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 24th March
item.description:
Loose and rocking kerbing stones Please lift and reset x 8 loose and rocking kerbstones 800x300x20mm Standard TM (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th March
item.description:
ENWD Please remove Tree debris (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped item, 24th March
item.description:
Pram halfway down Brunswick Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Brunswick Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x300x40mm approx Standard TM Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes NOT fixed, 24th March
item.description:
Hi - the road was closed yesterday but the pot holes between Cheltenham Timber and Pilgrove way are just as bad as before - it is dangerous to drive down. I’m not sure what work was carried out and this work needs to be revisited. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes NOT fixed, 24th March
item.description:
Hi - the road was closed yesterday but the pot holes between Cheltenham Timber and Pilgrove way are just as bad as before - it is dangerous to drive down. I’m not sure what work was carried out and this work needs to be revisited. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole hill is dotted in pot holes and needs serious attention, 24th March
item.description:
Gates of Foxcote manor
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Cotswold

item.title: Large pothole - more than one on this road, 24th March
item.description:
It is hard to pinpoint a property on this road. It was dark, road is not well lit. Many potholes along this road. Some have been repaired, new ones have appeared. I wish to make a claim due to the damage caused to our vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass across pavement, 24th March
item.description:
There are lots of little shards of broken glass across the pavement here as you head down onto Hayden Road which have been there for a few weeks now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
